title: coptis chinensis var. chinensis
intro: Coptis chinensis var. chinensis, also known as Huang Lian, is a variety of the goldthread plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. It is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coptis chinensis var. chinensis include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu. It is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its medicinal effects.
